title: What An Adventure Modpack
description: A Fabric Modpack that incorporates QOL features, and new dungeons, structures, items, and mobs to find.
body:
# What An Adventure Modpack (WAAM)

This modpack aims to bring that fun modpack exploration experience, but without the overly challenging aspects of modpacks like RLCraft. It also brings some quality of life features to better your adventures.
